## Release checklist
- [ ] Version bumped in `pyproject.toml`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] `README.md` version badge updated
- [ ] `uv lock` re-run so `uv.lock` matches the new version
- [ ] Tests pass
